name: Lin Lie
description:
Lin Lie, also known as Iron Fist, is a martial artist and superhero in Marvel Comics. He was originally introduced as Sword Master, a young hero from Shanghai who wielded the mystical Sword of Fu Xi, a powerful ancient blade connected to Chinese mythology.

Lin Lie was an ordinary college student until the sword bonded with him, pulling him into conflicts with demons, ancient gods, and powerful mystical forces. Despite being inexperienced at first, he showed courage and determination while protecting others and learning to control the sword’s power.

During a battle with dark forces, the Sword of Fu Xi was shattered. In the aftermath, Lin Lie was taken to the hidden mystical city of K’un‐Lun, where he trained under the Immortal Weapons. Through intense training and spiritual trials, he became the new Iron Fist, inheriting the legendary power once held by Danny Rand.

As Iron Fist, Lin Lie can channel mystical energy called chi into his fists, greatly increasing his strength, speed, durability, and martial arts abilities. His Iron Fist strike can shatter steel and defeat powerful enemies. Unlike previous Iron Fists, his power is tied to both the legacy of K’un-Lun and the lingering magic of the Sword of Fu Xi.

Lin Lie is known for his strong sense of responsibility, bravery, and determination to live up to the legacy of Iron Fist while forging his own path as a hero.
creator: BaraFinatic
